# Email Signatures

Email signatures let outgoing DocJacket messages match your brand and contact information. Create one default signature for everyday use, or keep separate signatures for different teams, brands, or roles.

## Creating a signature

1. Go to **Templates > Email Signatures**
2. Click **New Signature**
3. Enter a signature name
4. Use a starter layout or write your own signature content
5. Add contact details, logo, disclaimers, and links
6. Save the signature

## Using signatures

When you compose an email from a transaction, DocJacket can include your default signature automatically. You can also choose a different signature in the composer before sending.

Signatures work alongside [email templates](./email-templates.md). The template supplies the message content, and the signature supplies the branded closing block.

## Tips

- Keep your default signature concise so task emails stay easy to read.
- Include required brokerage or compliance language if your office requires it.
- Create a separate signature when a team, office, or role needs different branding.
